parameters.query:
SELECT
  slug          AS entity_slug,
  name          AS entity_name,
  entity_type,
  manufacturer,
  category,
  NULL::text    AS kb_text,
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS count
FROM entity_display
WHERE (
    search_vector @@ plainto_tsquery('english', $1)
    OR name ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
  )
  AND ($2 = '*' OR entity_type = $2)
  ORDER BY
    ts_rank(search_vector, plainto_tsquery('english', $1)) DESC,
    name ASC
  LIMIT $3::int OFFSET $4::int;
